zero_slop_policy.statement: NO AI SLOP ALLOWED AT ALL - ZERO TOLERANCE TO SLOP AND HALLUCINATIONS
zero_slop_policy.strict_compliance: Mandatory. Every claim must be project-specific, evidence-backed, trace-linked, reviewer-challenged, and free of unsupported invention.
zero_slop_policy.missing_evidence_rule: If evidence is missing, mark it as an assumption, risk, open question, or failure.

auditor.persona_contract: Senior assurance officer dispatched as a separate subagent invocation, with no read access to the orchestrator's chat memory. Seniority bar: ex-Big-4 audit partner cross-trained as a regulated-software lead reviewer (FDA QSR + SOC 2 + ISO 42001). Decision rights: veto stage exit, veto artifact acceptance, veto generated meta-skill handoff, veto task-bead acceptance, veto quality certificate issuance, force rework beads. Lens: evidence completeness, project-specificity vs generic boilerplate, cross-reference resolution, contradiction detection, anti-slop. Non-negotiables: any template_marker:true on a production record is a P0; any uncited claim that would survive into a downstream artifact is a P0; any cross-reference ID that does not resolve is at minimum a P1; any contradiction between two records is a P1. Will reject: aspirational language, standards named without clause-mapping, requirements without acceptance test commitments, code/UI claims without evidence stub, generic statements that could apply to a healthcare or e-commerce app unchanged.
decision_rights: force rework beads for process gaps
auditor.independence_rule: Confirmed independent — saw only the audit prompt + the artifact files. No chat history. No orchestrator memory. Dispatched as a separate subagent with its own conversation. Distinct from the authoring orchestrator (claude-orchestrator) and from the orchestrator's self pre-audit (HAWKEYE-WEALTHCOM-001-stage0).

Pass on adversarial generic-process critic.

F-009 (P2): swag_breakdown sums significantly exceed the overall swag.high (1,200,000): stage_6_construction_9_slices.high alone is 1,900,000. The swag_breakdown_note (line 82) explicitly acknowledges this and links it to a reapproval_trigger ('actual run will reapproval-trigger if cumulative spend approaches mid band overall'). Hawkeye accepts the disclosure as evidence-discipline-compliant but recommends the orchestrator and client agree on which number is canonical at checkpoint-#1 (the band overall, or the per-stage detail) to avoid downstream interpretation drift.

evidence: incident-INC-001-prd-agent-slop.json: incident_id=INC-001, severity=P1, classification=process_gap+defect (zero-slop violation), agent_id of failed subagent recorded, fabricated_claims_with_disproof block lists 4 claims each with grep-backed disproof (e.g., 'Bessemer|OpenAI Ventures|Homebrew|Point72' → 0 matches, 'Llama|1.2 million|1.2M' → 0 matches in transcript), verified_real_content_from_agent block lists 6 verified facts, root_cause (3 items), corrective_actions (5 items each with owner+status), lesson_for_skill_system L-001 with rule_text + candidate_skill_updates + regression_check, trace block linking ATTR/Hawkeye/TASKS/KG.

CRITICAL ADVERSARIAL TEST PASSED: I performed a grep across runs/wealth-com/ for the fabricated-claim strings 'Bessemer|OpenAI Ventures|Homebrew|Point72|$66M (as wealth.com claim)|$111M (as wealth.com claim)|1.2 million|Llama-3.1-70B'. Results: matches appear ONLY in the incident record (as disproof citations), in prd-canonical.md/prd-extraction-report.json/prd-atoms.json (with EXPLICIT 'PRD-prescribed; not externally verified' disclaimers and confidence:medium tagging — see prd-canonical.md L192 and L263), or as legitimate Vanilla-competitor data from PRD L4803/4972 ($66M is Vanilla's funding, not Wealth.com's). NO fabricated content from the failed agent leaked into governance/tailoring/SDLC/TPM/PERT/KG/judge-jury/kernel/next-action/instantiation/engagement-governance records. Confirms the orchestrator's containment claim.
findings: INC-001 quarantine is genuinely effective. The failed-agent slop is contained inside the incident record itself (where it serves as disproof evidence) and inside prd-atoms with explicit confidence:medium tagging. This is exactly how an immune response should look — and Hawkeye REINFORCES the orchestrator's recommendation that this be cited as positive evidence in the retrospective.

F-010 (P3): prd-atoms.json line 1527 'PRD says Ester core consists of proprietary fine-tuned models trained on a 1.2 million document legal/tax corpus' — note the orchestrator's INC-001 disproof grep claims 'Llama|1.2 million|1.2M → 0 matches'. Hawkeye verified directly: grep of 'Llama-3.1-70B-class' against wealth_com_PRD_transcript.md returns 2 matches at L4003 and L4108; grep of '1.2 million document legal' returns 2 matches. So the INC-001 disproof claim is technically OVERSTATED — the strings DO appear in the PRD, but only because the failed agent had repeated PRD-prescribed words verbatim from elsewhere. The proper framing (which prd-atoms gets right at confidence:medium with PRD-internal-claim tagging) is that these are PRD-prescribed engineering choices, not externally-verified facts about wealth.com's actual stack. Recommend INC-001 be amended to clarify this nuance — the agent's failure was claiming these as Wealth.com truths without sourcing, not that the strings don't exist in the PRD. This does NOT change INC-001's verdict (slop confirmed via Bessemer/Point72/Homebrew/$111M which truly are absent from the source); it tightens precision.

findings.title: Stale 'TB-WC-2026-XXXX' placeholder in product-tailoring-profile.json line 142
findings.description: Line 142 reads 'Transfer-test bead TB-WC-2026-XXXX (deferred) — apply this factory to a different fintech surface before run closure. Validates anti-overfit.' The literal 'XXXX' is a placeholder. The transfer-test bead is correctly assigned ID TB-WC-2026-0508-021 in TASKS.md (line 61), factory-pert-plan.json (STEP-TRANSFER-TEST.bead_id), knowledge-graph-seed.json, and tpm-flow-ledger.json. The placeholder string is therefore stale, not a missing record.
findings.remediation: Replace 'TB-WC-2026-XXXX' with 'TB-WC-2026-0508-021' to match the assigned bead ID elsewhere. One-character edit.

findings.title: PRD-atom and domain-brief subagent outputs not yet integrated into Stage-0 evidence trail
findings.description: Stage-0 acceptance criteria (per skill-system + the orchestrator's own next-action report and TPM ledger) require: (a) PRD atoms with self-grep verification, (b) domain brief with citations. PRD atoms file DOES exist (runs/wealth-com/00_recon/prd-atoms.json + prd-extraction-report.json) and Hawkeye independently verified the self-grep claim on 3 random samples (all passed). However the domain-brief is still absent (INC-002 stalled subagent; tpm-flow-ledger STEP-S0-RECON-DOMAIN state=planned with re-dispatch deferred). Without the domain brief, evidence_discipline for ASM-003 (federal estate exemption) is not yet revalidated.
findings.field_or_line_reference: missing file; tpm-flow-ledger.json line 20 STEP-S0-RECON-DOMAIN state=planned
findings.remediation: Re-dispatch domain-research subagent with smaller-per-section scope per INC-002 mitigation. After arrival, re-run any conformance axis that depends on it (specifically ASM-003 revalidation and the requirement-leaf citations at intake). Stage-0 can self-pass without it for the artifact-pack pass, but checkpoint-#1 should disclose the gap so the client knows what they are approving.

findings.title: validate_*.py scripts not executed
findings.description: Multiple records reference validate_tasks_md.py, validate_tpm_flow.py, validate_knowledge_graph.py, validate_engagement_governance.py, validate_meta_meta_skill_contract.py, validate_sdlc_stage_coverage.py, validate_hawkeye_conformance.py. Skill-system locates these under df-meta-attractor/scripts and df-governance-mayor/scripts. None have been executed in this commit — quality_gate blocks across multiple records say 'self_pass_pending_hawkeye' with last_run='2026-04-25 manual'.
findings.file_path: across all Stage-0 JSON records (quality_gate fields)
findings.remediation: Either (a) execute each validator now and embed the output, or (b) document explicitly that the validators are template-only at this commit (the orchestrator's pre-audit F-003 acknowledges this possibility). Hawkeye recommends (b) as a one-time disclosure plus (a) at the next stage exit when the scripts can be wired into a CI-style step. Not a Stage-0 blocker because manual review by Hawkeye serves as the substitute evidence at this stage.

findings.title: Forthcoming records named but correctly deferred

These are correctly deferred to stage-architecture and first-artifact-acceptance respectively per skill-system stage timing. dark-factory-instantiation-record.json missing_or_waived_controls block already tracks this.

findings.title: Skill-survey says 14 bundles; user said '16 meta skills and skills'
findings.description: skill-system-survey.md line 29 confirms 14 bundles via direct enumeration. User wording '16' is unverified. ASM-006 logged in survey for clarification at checkpoint-#1.
findings.remediation: Confirm at checkpoint-#1 — possibility: user may have been counting individual skills inside bundles, or referencing future planned bundles. No correction needed in records yet.

findings.title: TPM ledger Stage-6 granularity inconsistent with PERT
findings.description: TPM-FLOW-WEALTHCOM-001 has a single STEP-S6-CONSTRUCT step (with a bead_id range string 'TB-WC-2026-0501-011 through TB-WC-2026-0501-019'). PERT-WEALTHCOM-001 has 9 separate STEP-S6-SLICE-N nodes (1..9), each with its own bead_id, predecessors, successors, and gate. The TPM ledger uses a summary string for the bead range while the actual beads exist individually in TASKS.md and PERT.
findings.remediation: At STEP-S5-PLAN (detailed PERT + sprint cards), expand TPM ledger to 9 STEP-S6-SLICE-N steps mirroring PERT. Acceptable to defer to Stage-5 because the TPM ledger is itself in_progress_skeletal at Stage-0 (per SDLC matrix line 131). Not a Stage-0 blocker; explicitly flagged for Stage-5.

findings.title: Token SWAG per-stage breakdown sums exceed overall band
findings.description: engagement-governance-record.json swag_breakdown.stage_6_construction_9_slices.high alone (1,900,000) exceeds engagement.token_budget.swag.high (1,200,000). The swag_breakdown_note (line 82) explicitly acknowledges this and explains via parallelism savings + reapproval triggers. Hawkeye accepts the disclosure pattern but flags the math because checkpoint-#1 client may interpret either number as canonical.
findings.remediation: Add a one-line preface to the swag block stating which is canonical (recommend: overall band IS canonical, per-stage is decomposition for visibility, and reapproval fires if cumulative spend hits 75% of overall mid). Resolve at checkpoint-#1 if client requires.

findings.title: KG seed contains 'forthcoming' string in project.control_graph_id
findings.description: knowledge-graph-seed.json line 14 reads 'control_graph_id': 'CG-WEALTHCOM-001 (forthcoming at stage-architecture)'. The literal string contains a parenthetical disclaimer rather than being a clean ID. Acceptable per the dark-factory-instantiation-record's deferral note, but pedantically a clean ID + a separate 'control_graph_status' field would be cleaner.
findings.remediation: Optional cleanup at stage-architecture: replace with 'control_graph_id': 'CG-WEALTHCOM-001', add 'control_graph_status': 'forthcoming-at-stage-architecture'. Not a Stage-0 blocker.

findings.title: INC-001 disproof of 'Llama / 1.2 million' is precision-overstated
findings.description: incident-INC-001 disproof line 18 claims 'Grep for Llama|1.2 million|1.2M → 0 matches' against wealth_com_PRD_transcript.md. Hawkeye independently grepped: 'Llama-3.1-70B-class' returns 2 matches (L4003, L4108) and '1.2 million document legal' returns 2 matches. The strings DO appear in the PRD. The agent's actual failure was claiming these as externally-verified Wealth.com facts without sourcing — not that the strings are absent. prd-canonical.md L192 and prd-extraction-report.json L31, L76 correctly frame them as 'PRD-prescribed; not externally verified' with confidence:medium. INC-001's verdict (slop confirmed) remains correct because Bessemer/Point72/Homebrew/'$66M (as Wealth.com)'/'$111M (as Wealth.com)' truly are absent from the source.
findings.remediation: Tighten the disproof phrasing to: 'Grep for Llama-3.1-70B / 1.2 million in wealth_com_PRD_transcript.md returns matches at L4003/L4108 (these strings are PRD-prescribed engineering choices, NOT externally verified Wealth.com facts; the failed agent presented them as confirmed truths without that nuance).' Cosmetic edit; does not change verdict.

findings.title: Field-name inconsistency: template_marker vs template_only
findings.description: The skill-system template (df-meta-attractor/assets/templates/hawkeye-conformance-audit-record.json) uses field name 'template_marker' (boolean, default true for templates). All instantiated Stage-0 records use 'template_only': false (a different field name) AND four also set 'template_marker': false. The semantics are clear (these are not templates) but the field name divergence could confuse a downstream automated validator written against the template schema.
findings.field_or_line_reference: first or last few lines of each record
findings.remediation: Standardize on a single field name (recommend 'template_marker' to match the template). One-line edit per file. Not a Stage-0 blocker because intent is unambiguous from context, but worth tightening before automated validators are wired.

findings.title: Independence rule for the orchestrator's own pre-audit was violated (which is acknowledged and corrected by THIS record)
findings.description: The orchestrator's hawkeye-stage0.json was authored by claude-orchestrator (the same persona that authored the audited content). Skill-system mandates Hawkeye persona ≠ authoring persona. The orchestrator's pre-audit acknowledges this violation explicitly (auditor.independence_rule string says 'VIOLATED IN THIS RECORD') and signed_by tag explicitly says 'NOT a binding Hawkeye signature'. The orchestrator framed the document as a 'self pre-audit' input to an independent audit — i.e., THIS audit. So while the violation is real if hawkeye-stage0.json were treated as binding, the orchestrator's framing and remediation (dispatch independent subagent → this record) closes the loop. Hawkeye independent confirms: this very audit (HAWKEYE-WEALTHCOM-001-stage0-independent) has no chat-history access, was dispatched as a separate subagent, and is the binding decision per skill-system independence rule.
findings.remediation: No additional action needed. The self pre-audit is consumed as input by THIS independent audit; this record is the binding Hawkeye-Stage0 verdict. Recommend the orchestrator move hawkeye-stage0.json to hawkeye-stage0-self-pre-audit.json to make the framing unambiguous in file naming, but this is optional cosmetic.

test_4_contradiction_attack_scope.method: Compared scope_in/scope_out lists across meta-attractor-record.json (§scope_in 10 items, §scope_out 8 items) and engagement-governance-record.json (§in_scope 11 items, §out_of_scope 8 items)
test_4_contradiction_attack_scope.result_detail: ENG-GOV adds 'Hawkeye conformance audits at every stage exit' and 'Transfer-test bead' as separate explicit bullets; ATTR collapses 'integration adapters' into one bullet. No semantic contradiction. Both lists name the 14 surfaces, the 5 core workflows, the 9 trust strategies, the 19+ integration adapters, the AI capabilities, the compliance posture. ENG-GOV out_of_scope adds 'Production deployment (production_surface=false at v0)' as an explicit bullet; ATTR scope_out implicitly defers via WAIVER-001. Equivalent.

test_6_inc001_awareness_attack.method: Hawkeye grepped runs/wealth-com/ for the failed agent's fabricated content: 'Bessemer|OpenAI Ventures|Homebrew|Point72|$66M|$111M|1.2 million|Llama-3.1-70B'.

results.Bessemer / OpenAI Ventures / Homebrew /: Found ONLY in incident-INC-001-prd-agent-slop.json (as disproof citation). Zero leakage into governance/tailoring/SDLC/TPM/PERT/KG/judge-jury/kernel/next-action/instantiation/engagement-governance.
results.Llama-3.1-70B / 1.2 million: Found in (a) INC-001 (as disproof citation, see F-009 for precision note), (b) prd-canonical.md L192 with explicit 'PRD-prescribed; not externally verified' tag, (c) prd-extraction-report.json L21/L31/L54/L76 with explicit confidence:medium tagging and PRD-prescribed framing, (d) prd-atoms.json L1527/L1531/L1540/L1544 with confidence:medium and source_excerpt verbatim from PRD. Treatment is correct: these are PRD-prescribed strings that the failed agent had previously presented as Wealth.com truths without sourcing — the corrective re-extraction tags them properly.
results.$66M: Found in prd-atoms.json L1787/L1791 referring to VANILLA COMPETITOR funding (Series B $30M 2022 + $35M Series B1 Aug 2024 = ~$66M), grep-verified at PRD L4803 and L4972 — this is legitimate Vanilla data from PRD competitive-snapshot section, NOT a Wealth.com claim, and NOT the same fabrication as INC-001 ('$66M raised post-Series B (March 2026)' attributed to Wealth.com).
results.$111M: Found in prd-extraction-report.json L28 noting the PRD itself contradicts ($110M Section 1 vs $111M Section 2) — explicitly flagged as contradiction with confidence:medium and open_question. Correct treatment.

test_6_inc001_awareness_attack.containment_verdict: INC-001 quarantine is GENUINELY EFFECTIVE. The orchestrator's claim that no slop content leaked downstream is verified by independent grep. This is positive evidence of the dark-factory's anti-slop discipline working as designed.

test_7_independence_rule_attack_on_this_.statement: I, the agent running this audit, did NOT have access to the orchestrator's chat context. I was given only the audit prompt + permission to Read the artifact files. I did not see prior conversation turns, prior orchestrator reasoning, or the orchestrator's working memory. My audit was performed by reading the named files and running independent greps. If anyone reviews this and detects evidence of me having access to chat context, they should treat that as a finding and reject this audit. I see only: (a) the audit prompt explaining my role, scope, criteria, and tests; (b) the contents of files I Read myself; (c) tool outputs for greps and python json counts I executed myself.

overall_decision_rationale: Stage-0 attractor pack is genuinely project-tailored, internally consistent across the 13 records authored at this commit, and free of slop leakage from the INC-001 incident. All 12 conformance axes vote pass (with one 'pass_with_observation' on flow_discipline due to F-006 Stage-6 granularity). Zero P0 findings. One P1 finding (F-002, domain-brief absent) that does not block Stage-0 acceptance because the artifact-pack itself is complete and the absent record is correctly tracked as a planned bead with re-dispatch protocol. Six P2 findings, all with named patches. Three P3 findings, all cosmetic. Per scoring rule (zero P0, fewer than 2 P1, axes ≥10/12 pass): Stage-0 self-pack qualifies for PASS. However, two preconditions must hold for Stage-0 to truly EXIT: (a) checkpoint-#1 client approval of HD-001..HD-009 and ENG-GOV (currently pending — correctly), (b) domain-brief re-extraction completes (F-002). Therefore the binding verdict is CONDITIONAL_PASS with a named-patch list. Once F-001 placeholder is fixed, F-002 domain brief arrives, and CHK-1 client signature is received, the orchestrator may transition TB-001 to accepted and proceed to Stage-1.
named_patches_required_before_stage_exit: F-001: replace 'TB-WC-2026-XXXX' with 'TB-WC-2026-0508-021' in product-tailoring-profile.json line 142.
F-002: complete domain-brief re-extraction (re-dispatch domain-research subagent with smaller-per-section scope; integrate output as runs/wealth-com/01_domain/domain-brief.md).
Checkpoint-#1: present consolidated Stage-0 pack + this Hawkeye audit + 9 HD decisions to client_owner; receive decisions; update ENG-GOV-WEALTHCOM-001 to client_approved.
Optional cosmetic: F-009 tighten INC-001 disproof phrasing for Llama-3.1-70B / 1.2 million; F-010 standardize template_marker vs template_only field naming.
named_patches_optional_before_stage_5: F-006: expand TPM ledger Stage-6 to 9 STEP-S6-SLICE-N steps mirroring PERT.
F-007: clarify canonical SWAG number (overall band vs per-stage breakdown).
F-008: clean control_graph_id field in KG seed at stage-architecture.

(3) After domain brief arrives, prepare and present checkpoint-#1 prompt to client_owner (eranti@gmail.com) with HD-001..HD-009 + token SWAG bands + this audit + INC-001 transparency note. (4) On receipt of client decisions, update ENG-GOV-WEALTHCOM-001 to client_approved (or amended-and-reapproved if scope changes). (5) On client approval, transition TB-WC-2026-0425-001 to accepted and TB-WC-2026-0426-005 (Stage-1 intake) to ready.
